datapoints.description: Controller reconciliation rate per second over 5 minutes
datapoints.name: reconcile_rate

datapoints.description: Controller reconciliation error rate per second over 5 minutes
datapoints.name: reconcile_errors

datapoints.description: 99th percentile reconciliation duration in milliseconds over 5 minutes
datapoints.name: reconcile_duration_p99

datapoints.description: Current depth of the controller work queue
datapoints.name: workqueue_depth

datapoints.description: Work queue retry rate per second over 5 minutes
datapoints.name: workqueue_retries

description: Discovers ACM controllers and monitors reconciliation rates, errors, latency, and work queue depth via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Discovers ACM controllers via controller_runtime_reconcile_total and monitors reconciliation health. Uses standard controller-runtime metrics exposed by every Go operator built on controller-runtime. High reconcile_errors or deep workqueue_depth indicate controller backpressure or failures.
name: ACM_Controller_Health
